info.title: CoverageConvertor
info.description: Convert .coverage files to .coveragexml files to support SonarCloud Code Coverage when using VSTest@2.

options.name: --CoverageFilesFolder
options.description:
Required. The folder where the .coverage files
are defined.

options.name: --DotCoverageExtension
options.description:
(Default: .coverage) The extension from the
coverage files.

options.name: --AllDirectories
options.description:
(Default: true) Includes also sub-folders in the
search operation.

options.name: --Guid
options.description:
(Default: true) Only take .coverage file if the
folder is a guid (that's the one VSTest
creates).
